channel.title: math.GM updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.GM updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: On the Erd\H{o}s-Tur\'{a}n additive base conjecture
item.description: arXiv:2010.11857v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this paper, we formulate and prove several variants of the Erd\H{o}s-Tur\'{a}n additive bases conjecture.
item.dc:creator: Theophilus Agama

item.title: Relative consistency of a finite nonclassical theory incorporating ZF and category theory with ZF
item.description: arXiv:2407.18969v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recently, in Axioms 10(2): 119 (2021), a nonclassical first-order theory T of sets and functions has been introduced as the collection of axioms we have to accept if we want a foundational theory for (all of) mathematics that is not weaker than ZF, that is finitely axiomatized, and that does not have a countable model (if it has a model at all, that is). Here we prove that T is relatively consistent with ZF. We conclude that this is an important step towards showing that T is an advancement in the foundations of mathematics.
item.dc:creator: Marcoen J. T. F. Cabbolet, Adrian R. D. Mathias
